title: Complaint
description: A closed complaint of NYPD misconduct within CCRB jurisdiction — the core incident record. Canonical schema reconciling the 'Civilian Complaint Review Board: Complaints Against Police Officers' dataset (2mby-ccnw, 14 columns) and the Data Transparency Initiative complaints dashboard. Keyed on Complaint Id. A complaint carries one or more Allegations.

complaintId.description: CCRB complaint identifier ('Complaint Id') — primary key.

receivedDate.description: Date CCRB received the complaint ('CCRB Received Date').

closeDate.description: Date the complaint was closed ('Close Date').

incidentDate.description: Date of the underlying incident ('Incident Date').

incidentHour.description: Hour of day of the incident ('Incident Hour').

reasonForPoliceContact.description: Reason for the police contact ('Reason for Police Contact').

outcomeOfPoliceEncounter.description: Outcome of the police encounter ('Outcome Of Police Encounter') — e.g. arrest, summons, no action.

videoEvidence.description: Whether video evidence was present ('Video Evidence').

bwcEvidence.description: Whether NYPD body-worn camera evidence was present ('BWC Evidence').
